results.description: Premium finish resists tarnishing and corrosion|Solid brass construction for durable, lasting performance|Shower valve is made of brass with stainless steel cover|Features a contemporary round design|Various functions create a spa-like shower experience|Choose from elegant finish options like chrome, matte black, and brushed brass|The sleek cover conceals screws for a polished look|Seamlessly integrates with various bathroom styles|Hot and cold water mixer allows for easy temperature adjustment|Expertly crafted for long-lasting durability|Easy-to-install design suitable for DIY and professionals|A perfect blend of modern innovation and timeless elegance|Designed for easy cleaning|Pairs perfectly with your favorite showerhead for a cohesive look|Compatible with standard IPS or NPT plumbing connections|Easy to install with basic plumbing tools|Designed for long-term residential use|Available in multiple finishes to match your fixtures|<a target="_blank" href="/customer-service/shipping-delivery">Eligible for Free Shipping on orders $99+</a>|Important: Item must be inspected within 48 hours of receipt
